heading: Overview of
MBA in Finance and Marketing

overViewImage.alt: MBA in Finance and Marketing – Program Overview

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Unlock Dual Expertise in Finance, Markets, and Modern Marketing
overViewOfOnline.description: The MBA in Finance and Marketing at Teksversity equips learners with a dual specialization that integrates financial strategy, market analytics, branding, and business growth planning. Learners work with financial models, market research data, consumer analytics, and digital marketing systems to develop strong analytical and managerial capabilities. The program blends finance foundations with marketing strategy to help professionals build competitive skills for diverse business environments. Designed for working individuals, this online MBA enables learners to excel in financial markets, strategic marketing roles, business development, and data-driven decision-making across industries in India and globally.
keyPoints: Understand financial analysis, markets, and branding insights
Use analytical tools, dashboards, and market metrics
Strengthen financial and marketing decision abilities
Apply ethical and strategic practices in business
Develop leadership for finance and marketing roles

heading: Why Choose MBA in Finance and Marketing
in Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity delivers a dual-focused MBA that builds strong financial and marketing capabilities through hands-on tasks, modelling assignments, and real-world business case studies. Students explore financial planning, portfolio basics, budgeting, branding strategy, customer analytics, and marketing execution to develop job-ready expertise.

description.firstDescription: Guided by experienced finance and marketing mentors, the curriculum includes forecasting, financial modelling, market segmentation, pricing strategy, and digital marketing decision-making. This practical orientation helps learners apply concepts confidently in workplace scenarios.

description.secondDescription: The flexible online model supports working professionals aiming to grow in finance, marketing, or business leadership roles. With resume building, mock interviews, and placement support, Teksversity ensures learners transition smoothly into competitive dual-specialization positions across industries in India and global markets.

faq.question: What is an MBA in Finance and Marketing?
faq.answer: An MBA in Finance and Marketing is a dual-specialization program that combines financial management with marketing strategy. It focuses on investment analysis, budgeting, promotions, consumer behavior, brand management, and business development to prepare students for leadership roles in dynamic business environments.

faq.question: Who should pursue this course?
faq.answer: This program is ideal for graduates interested in careers that blend financial decision-making, market strategy, and business growth. It suits individuals who want to work in finance, branding, sales, consulting, or entrepreneurial roles.

faq.question: What skills will I gain from this specialization?
faq.answer: Students develop skills in financial planning, budgeting, investment management, marketing strategy, digital marketing, sales planning, branding, market research, risk analysis, business analytics, negotiation, and strategic decision-making.

faq.question: What subjects are included in this specialization?
faq.answer: Core subjects include Financial Accounting, Corporate Finance, Marketing Management, Consumer Behavior, Services Marketing, Digital Marketing, Sales Management, Business Analytics, Investment Analysis, and Strategic Management.

faq.question: What career opportunities are available after completing this MBA?
faq.answer: Graduates can work as Financial Analyst, Marketing Manager, Brand Manager, Business Development Manager, Investment Advisor, Market Research Analyst, Sales Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, or Product Manager.

faq.question: How does this specialization benefit my career?
faq.answer: This program equips you with multidisciplinary expertise in finance and marketing, enabling you to contribute to both financial performance and market growth. It increases your value to employers and opens up diverse career options across industries.

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA in Finance and Marketing?
faq.answer: Applicants must have a bachelor’s degree in any discipline from a recognized institution. Admission may involve entrance exams, academic merit, and personal interviews depending on university requirements.

faq.question: Does the program include practical exposure?
faq.answer: Yes. Students engage in live projects, market research studies, financial simulations, internships, case analyses, and industry workshops that build practical business skills.

faq.question: What tools and software will I learn?
faq.answer: The course may include exposure to Excel (Advanced), financial modelling tools, ERP systems, CRM tools, analytics software, and digital marketing platforms used in corporate environments.

faq.question: What is the salary potential after completing this MBA?
faq.answer: Fresh graduates generally earn between ₹4–8 LPA, while experienced professionals or those in strategic roles may earn ₹10–20 LPA or more, depending on expertise and industry demand.
